# Dashboard Guide

Welcome to the dashboard. This page provides an overview of your account activity and key metrics.

## Getting Started

The dashboard displays real-time analytics for your projects. You can track user engagement, revenue trends, and conversion rates from a single view.

## Key Metrics

- **Active Users**: 12,450 this month
- **Revenue**: $45,200 this quarter
- **Conversion Rate**: 3.2% average across all funnels
- **Bounce Rate**: 24% — well below industry average

## Recent Activity

The activity feed shows the latest events across all your connected services. Each entry includes a timestamp, event type, and relevant metadata.

## Customization

You can rearrange dashboard widgets by dragging them into your preferred layout. Changes are saved automatically to your profile.
